name: Typeform
shortDescription: Comprehensive form building and data collection platform with advanced customization, translation capabilities, and detailed analytics integration.

actions.name: Get Current Account Info
actions.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's profile information from the Typeform API.

actions.name: Get List Workspaces
actions.description: Retrieves a list of workspaces for a specific account from Typeform. This method allows filtering of workspaces by search string and supports pagination.

actions.name: Create Empty Form
actions.description: Creates an empty form with default settings and properties.

actions.name: Copy Existing Form
actions.description: Duplicates an existing form.

actions.name: Update Question Options
actions.description: Updates the options for a dropdown, multiple choice, or ranking question in a Typeform.

actions.name: Create Workspace
actions.description: Creates a new workspace in Typeform under the user's account with organization role - owner.

actions.name: Delete Workspace
actions.description: Deletes a workspace in Typeform by its unique ID.

actions.name: Get Workspace
actions.description: Retrieves details of a workspace in Typeform by its unique ID.

actions.name: Update Workspace
actions.description: Updates a workspace by applying specified operations to its elements, such as renaming or modifying members.

actions.name: Get List Forms
actions.description: Retrieves a list of JSON descriptions for all forms in the Typeform account. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination.

actions.name: Delete Form
actions.description: Deletes a specific form in Typeform along with all its responses.

actions.name: Get Form
actions.description: Retrieves a form by its unique form ID, including any associated themes and images.

actions.name: Update Form Patch
actions.description: Updates specific attributes of an existing form in Typeform. Supports partial updates using JSON Patch format.

actions.name: Update Form Completely
actions.description: Updates an existing form in Typeform. This method overwrites the entire form, so all existing fields must be included in the request body. If fields are omitted, they will be deleted from the form. Make sure to include all necessary fields, including the field IDs.

actions.name: Get Custom Form Messages
actions.description: Retrieves the customizable messages for a form specified by Form ID, using the form's specified language. Messages can be formatted with bold (*bold*) and italic (_italic_) text. HTML tags are forbidden.

actions.name: Update Custom Messages
actions.description: Updates customizable messages for a form specified by Form ID. Messages can be formatted with bold (*bold*) and italic (_italic_) text. HTML tags are forbidden. All customizable fields you can find here: https://www.typeform.com/developers/create/reference/update-custom-messages/

actions.name: Get Form Translations Payload
actions.description: Retrieves the form content in the main language, useful for using it as a base for translations in different languages.

actions.name: Get Translation Statuses
actions.description: Retrieves the translation statuses for each language for a specified form.

actions.name: Delete Form Translation
actions.description: Deletes the translation content for a specified form and language.

actions.name: Get Form Translation
actions.description: Retrieves the translation content for a specified form and language.

actions.name: Update Form Translation
actions.description: Updates the translation content for a specified form and language.

actions.name: Auto-Translate Form
actions.description: Requests an automatic translation for a specified form and language.

actions.name: Get Images Collection
actions.description: Retrieves a list of JSON descriptions for all images in your Typeform account.

actions.name: Create Image
actions.description: Adds an image to your Typeform account.

actions.name: Delete Image
actions.description: Deletes an image from your Typeform account.

actions.name: Get Image
actions.description: Retrieves the JSON description or the binary of the original image for the specified image_id.

actions.name: Get Background by Size
actions.description: Retrieves a specific background image by its unique ID and desired size from Typeform's image library.

actions.name: Get Choice Image By Size
actions.description: Retrieves a choice image by its unique ID and specified size from Typeform's image library.

actions.name: Get Image By Size
actions.description: Get the JSON description or the binary of the requested image format.

actions.name: Get List Themes
actions.description: Retrieves a list of JSON descriptions for all themes in the Typeform account, both public and private. Themes are listed in reverse-chronological order based on the date added.

actions.name: Delete Theme
actions.description: Deletes a theme from the Typeform account.

actions.name: Get Theme
actions.description: Retrieves a theme from the Typeform account.

actions.name: Create Theme
actions.description: Creates a new theme in the Typeform account.

actions.name: Delete Responses
actions.description: Deletes responses for a specified form in Typeform.

actions.name: Get Form Responses
actions.description: Retrieves responses for a specified Typeform.

actions.name: Get Form Insights
actions.description: Retrieves form-level and individual question-level insights for a specified form.

idealUseCases: Dynamic form creation and customization workflows
Form response analysis and data processing
Lead generation and customer data collection
Advanced form analytics and insights reporting
